businessQuestion: Which products have the highest weeks of supply and may be overstocked?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DP.CATEGORY,
    DP.PRODUCT_NAME,
    DS.STORE_NAME,
    AVG(FI.WEEKS_OF_SUPPLY) AS AVG_WEEKS_OF_SUPPLY,
    SUM(FI.INVENTORY_VALUE_COST) AS INVENTORY_VALUE
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_INVENTORY FI
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_PRODUCT DP
    ON FI.PRODUCT_KEY = DP.PRODUCT_KEY
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_STORE DS
    ON FI.STORE_KEY = DS.STORE_KEY
GROUP BY
    DP.CATEGORY,
    DP.PRODUCT_NAME,
    DS.STORE_NAME
ORDER BY AVG_WEEKS_OF_SUPPLY DESC;
businessContext: Inventory planners want to identify slow-moving inventory before markdowns become necessary.
